welcome_text1: KaiLinks connects East Asia, Latin America, and Europe through innovation programs, business delegations, market-entry support, and on-ground event execution.
welcome_text2: We work beyond simple expo attendance: our team builds agendas, coordinates institutions and partners, and manages the local details that make international programs useful.
about_text1: Our team brings together experience in events, logistics, market entry, education programs, and international business coordination.
about_text2: With roots in Mexico and Japan and active links in Germany, we support organizations across Latin America, East Asia, and Europe from early planning to on-site execution.
coverage_latam_text: Embassies, companies, institutions, and regional delegations.
coverage_asia_text: Japan-based programs, ecosystem visits, events, and operations.
coverage_europe_text: Germany and EU-facing trade, visits, and partner coordination.
full_management_text: Comprehensive support covering booth design, staffing, logistics, on-site representation, and more to ensure a seamless exhibition experience.
remote_exhibition_text: We manage your booth, engage with visitors, and present your products, ensuring a professional and impactful presence in your absence.
shared_booth_text: Share a booth space with other companies, allowing your products to be showcased to a global audience at a fraction of the cost.
market_research_text: Services to help establish your company in a new market, including market research, business matchmaking and cultural and legal guidance.
local_offices: Assistance with setting up local offices
event_management_text: We assist in planning and managing international gatherings and events.
informal_networking: Participating in informal networking opportunities centered around engaging activities.
cosme_week_description: At COSME Week, everything for beauty like cosmetics brands, health foods, ingredients, OEM, packaging, beauty equipment, etc., gather at once!
logistics_world_description: The Logistics World Summit & Expo in Mexico is a key event for the logistics, transportation, and supply chain industries.
manufacturing_world_description: Discover all you need to know to plan your visit to Manufacturing World Tokyo.
meximold_description: Meximold brings together the industry's most prominent leaders and experts to offer the latest technologies in Mold Industry.
robotworld_description: ROBOTWORLD, International Robot Exhibition is one of the leading robot exhibitions in Asia-Pacific
sky_event_description: This is a networking event to bring together Japanese and foreign professionals for an unforgettable sky event in the Japanese Alps.
initial_meeting: Initial meeting to understand your business needs.
define_scope: Define the project scope based on your objectives.
develop_approach: Develop a customized approach for your exhibition, market entry, or event.
design_concept: Design the concept, plan logistics, and finalize strategy.
coordinate_setup: Coordinate travel, booth design, and local setup.
integrate_features: Ensure smooth integration of market entry or event features.
execute_plan: Execute the plan with on-the-ground support for events or exhibitions.
oversee_logistics: Oversee logistics, attendee management, and exhibitor or partner engagement.
post_event_support: Provide post-event support, including feedback and reporting.
evaluate_impact: Evaluate the event or market entry impact.
detailed_reports: Provide detailed reports on ROI, engagement, and market insights.
strategic_recommendations: Offer strategic recommendations for future events or expansions.
trip_from_tokyo_label: Trip from Tokyo | from $500 for 2 days
event_tokyo_participation: We have participated yet in another event in Tokyo
startup_event_freiburg: We attended a startup event in Freiburg
post3: We organized the first ski-networking event of the season
services_intro: Three focused lines for organizations building serious programs across East Asia, Latin America, and Europe.
education_text: Academic visits, innovation ecosystem immersions, conferences, and institutional exchanges with clear agendas and local execution.
education_item_1: University, incubator, and startup ecosystem visits
business_text: Market diagnosis, B2B agenda design, exhibition participation, and local coordination for companies entering Japan or Latin America.
business_item_3: Expo, pitch, and product presentation support
delegation_text: End-to-end program design for delegations, incentive groups, special-interest visits, and multi-city programs that need reliable local delivery.
delegation_item_1: Itinerary design, supplier sourcing, and booking
delegation_item_2: Venue, transport, hospitality, and staffing coordination
delegation_item_3: Embassy, institution, and partner-facing event support
current_direction_intro: KaiLinks is moving from isolated expo support toward innovation-driven programs across East Asia, Latin America, and Europe.
featured_event_text: Embassies, startups, companies, students, and support organizations meet at Tokyo Innovation Base to explore Japan-Latin America business and innovation links.
tib_event_text: A public program connecting companies, embassies, startups, and support organizations across East Asia and Latin America.
latam_pavilion_text: A broader platform for Latin American companies and institutions, no longer limited to one country or one product category.
innovation_text: Building on startup, tech, and institutional relationships to support better agendas than simple trade-fair attendance.
proof_intro: A stronger case for KaiLinks: technology access, institutional trust, and real on-ground execution.
proof_tech_text: KaiLinks has worked around startup and technology ecosystems, including ambassador-style activity around Sushi Tech and Japan-based innovation networks.
proof_institution_text: The new direction includes events with Latin American embassies, universities, and public innovation spaces in Tokyo.
proof_execution_text: We handle agendas, suppliers, staffing, translation, venue coordination, reporting, and on-site problem solving.
tib_update_text: A public event connecting companies, embassies, startups, and support organizations.
latam_update_text: The platform is expanding from country-specific booth support into broader regional programs.
ops_update_text: Programs can combine market entry, events, education, delegation logistics, and partner coordination.
partners_intro: Organizations, institutions, and collaborators connected through KaiLinks programs.
team_intro: A compact operating team for program design, local coordination, and on-site delivery.
